label: "Done today" now counts everything you cleared
items: The dashboard's "X of Y done today" now counts tasks you complete today even if they were overdue — clearing old tasks moves the number, instead of leaving it stuck.
Tasks you completed today stay visible on the dashboard once ticked off, rather than disappearing.
Completed harvests now show a "Harvest completed on {date}" note so it's clear when the whole harvest was logged.
